tasks.subject: SK Task 1: ensureActiveSigningKey helper + call site + unit test
tasks.description:
Boot helper provisioning+activating an initial OIDC signing key when none active, wired into NewServer; pure currentDEK unit test.

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/server/signing_key_bootstrap.go","pkg/server/signing_key_bootstrap_test.go","pkg/server/server.go"],"verifyCommand":"go build -tags nodynamic ./... && go test ./pkg/server/ -run SigningKeyBootstrap -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["no-op when active; ErrNoRows→provision+log; other err→warn","empty DEK→warn+return","insert/activate err→warn (not fatal)","NewServer calls after queries:=db.New(conn)","currentDEK highest version + ok=false; unit-tested"]}
```

tasks.subject: SK Task 2: Runtime verification (fresh keyset boots functional)
tasks.description:
Full gate + subagent runtime: empty signing_key → boot → auto-provisioned log + one active key + JWKS exposes it + forward-auth verify→302 authorize; re-boot no-op.

```json:metadata
{"files":[],"verifyCommand":"go vet ./... && go build -tags nodynamic ./... && go test ./...","acceptanceCriteria":["empty signing_key→boot logs auto-provisioned","1 active key + JWKS one key","forward-auth verify 302 reaches /oauth/authorize","re-boot no-op","gate green"]}
```
